statement: Profitable trading is achievable with position holding time < 60 s on Binance USDT-perps at standard fees (maker 0.02%, taker 0.05%).
note: Conditional close: YES iff (a) sufficient directional predictivity AND (b) a reaction-latency budget. Budget & volatility RESOLVED: selective perfect-foresight oracle nets 4.6-6.6 bp/trade at taker (10bp+spread) and 2.9-4.8 at maker on all 8 symbols @60s (ample tail move over cost); OBI edge half-life seconds->tens-of-seconds (ETH ~12s..LTC >60s) => reaction budget ~<=1-2 s, met by a near-Binance box (1-3ms RTT). Binding gap = PREDICTIVITY: best deployable no-look-ahead OBI-class signal ~1.6 bp gross directional capture/trade < 4 bp maker floor => sub-cost-alone, a baseline to stack on, NOT refuted (selection policy). Descriptive microstructure screen only (no model fit, no train/test split); achievable predictivity from richer signals (cross-asset lead-lag, flow toxicity, OI/funding/liquidation) = open direction. receipt_timestamp excluded (Cryptolake vendor ingest, not our path). Detail: C:/Dev/sub60s-hold-feasibility/sub60s-hold-feasibility.md.
